recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: The Last 10 Years
recommendations.overview: Twenty-year-old Matsuri Takabayashi learns that she only has ten years to live due to an incurable disease. She decides to not dwell on her life and not to fall in love—until she meets a man named Kazuto Manabe at a school reunion.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: My Days of Mercy
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.

recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Avenging Angelo
recommendations.overview: A woman who has recently discovered that she is the daughter of Angelo, a major mafia boss, decides to wreak vengeance when he is killed by a hitman. She's aided by his faithful bodyguard, with whom she soon falls in love.

recommendations.title: 7th Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1910s Paris, a sewer worker disillusioned with Christianity feels his prayers have been answered when he chances upon a street waif and they fall in love.
